title: Add mock relationship builder (Golden Test 6)
problem: Accepted claims are linked to concepts but no evidence relationships exist. Golden Test 6 requires turning the semantic-diversity claim into a support edge between AI assistance and semantic diversity.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 6: relationship builder creates support edges.
acceptance_criteria: research build-relationships --source <source_id> creates at least one active relationship with evidence link.
Semantic-diversity claim supports AI assistance may_reduce semantic diversity edge per Golden Test 6.
relationship_evidence rows include stance supports and claim_id.
non_goals: Do not implement scoring or public export.
Do not build full graph reconciliation yet.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket branch; delete relationships and relationship_evidence rows from local SQLite.
